overall.description: A first-person helicopter cockpit view from a flight simulator, flying through dense fog over an urban coastal area during dawn. The helicopter maintains steady flight before banking right to follow the coastline, revealing the transition from urban terrain to open water below.

scene_state.functional_zone: helicopter cockpit view over foggy urban sprawl

agents.ego_description: flying helicopter straight and level over dense fog covering urban terrain below, maintaining steady altitude and heading

entered.detail: AS350 helicopter instrument cluster with GPS navigation display and flight gauges
dense gray fog obscuring distant visibility and blending sky with ground
fog-covered urban development with indistinct buildings and streets visible below

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady first-person cockpit view from a helicopter flying through dense dawn fog over an urban area. The instrument panel remains fixed in the foreground while the foggy urban landscape passes below, with extremely limited visibility due to weather conditions.

events.description: helicopter begins banking to the right, initiating a turn toward the coastline
coastline becomes visible through fog on the right side as urban terrain transitions to water

agents.ego_description: banking helicopter right while maintaining altitude, transitioning flight path from over land toward coastal waters

entered.detail: foggy shoreline boundary where urban land meets water, becoming visible on the right horizon
control stick visible on the left side of the cockpit as the camera angle shifts during the bank

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks right, revealing the coastline through the fog. The urban terrain shifts to the left of the frame while the shoreline curves into view on the right, marking the transition from land to water. The control stick becomes visible as the aircraft attitude changes.

events.description: helicopter completes transition from flying over land to flying over open water

agents.ego_description: continuing right turn over foggy coastal waters with the shoreline now visible to the left, maintaining steady flight above the water surface

entered.detail: calm gray water surface visible below through the fog, replacing the urban terrain

segments.scene_description: The helicopter continues its right turn, now flying fully over the fog-covered water with the coastline visible to the left. The urban landscape has passed behind, replaced by the open water below, while the instrument panel and control stick remain visible in the cockpit foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective as a helicopter transitions from a dense urban fog into a flight over open coastal waters. It begins with a steady view of the instrument panel while flying through thick dawn fog, where the city landscape below is barely visible through the haze. As the helicopter banks right, the control stick enters the frame and the urban terrain shifts to the left, gradually revealing the curving shoreline through the mist. The scene then opens further as the aircraft completes its turn, leaving the city behind to fly fully over the fog-covered water. Finally, the camera stabilizes with the coastline receding to the left and the vast, obscured ocean stretching out below the cockpit.
